items.title: Getting Started With Myriad
items.summary: Prediction market Myriad enables you to make predictions on real-world events and markets. Here’s how to get set up and start using it.

items.title: Kraken parent Payward cuts 150 staff, streamlining business ahead of planned IPO
items.summary: The crypto exchange is also seeking fresh funding at a $20 billion valuation as it ramps up acquisitions and prepares for a public listing.

items.title: Gemini Stock Jumps on Revenue Rise, $100M Bitcoin Investment From Winklevoss Capital
items.summary: Crypto exchange Gemini secured a $100 million Bitcoin investment from its founders’ fund, and revealed a 42% YOY Q1 revenue bump.

items.title: Polish lawmakers back revised crypto bill after repeated vetoes
items.summary: Polish lawmakers approve a Ministry of Finance-backed crypto bill to implement the EU MiCA framework in a 241–200 vote after repeated vetoes.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: BNB is only gainer as index drops 2%
items.summary: BNB (BNB) rose 0.4% while Bitcoin (BTC) fell 1.3% from Thursday.

items.title: XRP gives back gains after Senate crypto bill sparks 5% rally
items.summary: XRP stayed pinned below resistance even as derivatives activity surged ahead of a key Senate vote that could formally reinforce the token’s commodity status.

items.title: Bitcoin Shrugs Off CLARITY Gains as Institutions Sell Amid Surging Treasury Yields
items.summary: Analysts point to profit-taking, not panic, with ETF outflows at their worst pace since February as 10-year Treasury yield soars.

items.title: Bitcoin stalls above $80K despite CLARITY Act pass: What will trigger a breakout?
items.summary: Bitcoin’s break above $82,000 and a return of strong institutional demand are prerequisites to confirm a trend change for BTC price.

items.title: Strategy to repurchase $1.5 billion of 2029 convertible bonds using cash or bitcoin sales
items.summary: Led by Michael Saylor, the company aims to retire half of its outstanding 0% 2029 converts as it restructures liabilities tied to its bitcoin treasury strategy.

items.title: Dune Analytics Slashes 25% of Workforce in AI, Institutional Pivot
items.summary: Dune is restructuring around artificial intelligence and enterprise clients, shedding a quarter of its workforce in the process.

items.title: South Korea plans July rules for tokenized securities
items.summary: South Korea's FSC is preparing detailed rules for tokenized securities before a legal framework for blockchain-based securities takes effect in February 2027.

items.title: Winklevoss’ Gemini jumps 25% on $100 million bitcoin infusion despite deepening losses
items.summary: Gemini's revenue improved 42% year-over-year to $50.3 million, helping narrow its net loss by 27% from $149.3 million a year earlier.

items.title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Just Passed Its First Major Vote
items.summary: The Clarity Act passed a bipartisan vote in its 1st checkpoint. Coinbase made a major deal with Hyperliquid and HYPE ripped on the news.

items.title: OKX, Korea Investment and Securities said to be in talks for 40% of Coinone
items.summary: OKX's planned move into the South Korean market would echo that of Binance, which completed its acquisition of Seoul-based Gopax last year.

items.title: Bitcoin risks ‘next downtrend’ as traders diverge on fate of $82K resistance
items.summary: Bitcoin traders split between a "massive catch-up" with stocks and the start of its "next downtrend" as BTC price action failed to flip $82,000 to support.

items.title: THORChain pauses trading after suspected $10M exploit
items.summary: THORChain paused trading after ZachXBT flagged a suspected $10 million exploit spanning Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB Chain and Base.

items.title: Crypto’s regulatory tailwind runs into a potential rates reset
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 15, 2026

items.title: Wall Street is starting to notice one of crypto’s smartest AI bets
items.summary: A growing spotlight on Nof1’s Alpha Arena suggests SUI Group and Karatage may have gotten early to one of the most important experiments in finance: teaching AI how to trade in real markets.

items.title: Why is Hyperliquid's HYPE token price up 23% in one day?
items.summary: Fresh US ETF launches and Coinbase’s Hyperliquid deal helped fuel HYPE’s rally this week, but technicals warn of a possible pullback.

items.title: OKX reportedly eyes Coinone stake in South Korea push
items.summary: OKX is reportedly seeking a 20% stake in South Korean crypto exchange Coinone as foreign and domestic firms compete for market access.

items.title: THORChain’s RUNE Token Plunges Double Digits After $10M Exploit, Trading Halt
items.summary: The liquidity protocol halted operations after blockchain researchers identified a suspected $10 million breach across multiple networks.

items.title: Hyperliquid leads 24-hour gains as altcoins pace bitcoin
items.summary: HYPE’s surge is being fueled by Bitwise’s new spot Hyperliquid ETF and Coinbase’s expanded role as Hyperliquid’s official USDC treasury deployer.

items.title: Hana Bank to acquire $670 million stake in Upbit operator Dunamu
items.summary: The South Korean bank announced plans for a won-pegged stablecoin, blockchain remittances and tokenized securities.

items.title: Thorchain halts trading after $10 million cross-chain exploit, RUNE token drops 12%
items.summary: The cross-chain liquidity protocol paused all trading and signing on Friday after an attacker drained roughly $10.8 million across Bitcoin, Ethereum, BSC, and Base.

items.title: IREN closes $3 billion convertible notes deal amid AI infrastructure expansion
items.summary: Bitcoin miner turned AI infrastructure operator secures one of the sector’s largest financings as investor demand drives multiple upsizes.

items.title: Strategy’s STRC stock logs record $1.5 billion trading volume, funds 11,707 bitcoin purchase
items.summary: Heavy trading volume ahead of the ex-dividend date pushed STRC to its busiest session on record.

items.title: Hana Financial to acquire 6.55% stake in Upbit operator Dunamu for $668M
items.summary: The purchase makes Hana Financial the fourth-largest shareholder in Dunamu, following several crypto-related deals in the last two months, as it dives deeper into the digital assets sector.

items.title: The U.S. stock market is getting close to dot-com bubble peak valuations
items.summary: The Shiller cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings ratio for U.S. stocks is nearing the 1999 peak seen during the dot-com bubble.

items.title: Signal hints it could leave Canada over lawful access bill
items.summary: Signal's vice president of strategy said the firm “would rather pull out of the country” than comply with Bill C-22, which could threaten end-to-end encryption.

items.title: Australia’s proposed CGT changes could discourage long-term crypto holding
items.summary: Robin Singh, CEO and founder of Koinly said the changes will hurt low-income crypto investors most and could encourage more short-term trading.

items.title: Kraken joins LayerZero exodus as it switches to Chainlink CCIP
items.summary: LayerZero has come under scrutiny since it was exploited in April, as crypto protocols reevaluate their cross-chain providers and seek safer alternatives.

items.title: Strategy’s STRC hits record $1.5B trading volume
items.summary: Strategy has leaned on Stretch to fund Bitcoin buys over the past 12 months as funding through senior convertible notes and at-the-market equity offerings has tightened.

items.title: Bullish shares dip on Q1 earnings miss, $605M loss
items.summary: Bullish stock dropped in trading with the crypto exchange’s first-quarter earnings miss, adding to the crypto companies that have underperformed in the quarter.

items.title: CLARITY will strengthen dollar stablecoins, but Asia wins on yield: HashKey Research
items.summary: HashKey says U.S. regulatory clarity may unlock institutional adoption of crypto and reinforce USD stablecoins globally, though stricter yield rules could push capital toward Asian markets offering higher returns.

items.title: Cardano whales now hold 67% of ADA supply in highest share since 2020
items.summary: Wallets holding at least one million ADA now control 25.09 billion tokens, the highest share since July 2020, even as Cardano's TVL has bled to $137 million from a December 2024 peak of $686 million, per Santiment and DefiLlama data.

items.title: Lawyer behind Arbitrum crypto seizure fight now targets Tether for $344 million
items.summary: Charles Gerstein wants a federal judge to order Tether to transfer OFAC-frozen USDT tied to Iran’s Revolutionary Guard to victims holding unpaid terrorism judgments

items.title: Bitcoin is still stuck below its 200-day average. Treasury yields may be the reason.

items.summary: Dune co-founder and CEO Fredrik Haga says the company’s staff cuts come as it shifts focus and is “all-in” on AI and institutional interest in crypto.

items.summary: Strive reported a net loss of $265.9 million for Q1, which it attributed to the fall in market value of its Bitcoin holdings, but saw its shares on its move to pay SATA holders dividends every business day starting in June.
